# 🚀 Pull Request: [Feature/Fix Name]

## 📝 Description
Provide a concise summary of the changes and the motivation behind them.

## 🎨 UI Changes (If applicable)
- [ ] Added/Updated Glassmorphism components.
- [ ] Verified responsiveness on mobile/desktop.
- [ ] Adhered to the [Design Guide](docs/DESIGN_GUIDE.md).

## 🛠️ Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 💅 Styling/UI polish

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the branding guidelines (No personal identifiers).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly.
